# Niche adaptation guide

## SaaS / software

Best mechanisms:

```text
workflow pain first
screen recording zooms
before/after task speed
feature as fix, not first frame
```

Primary metrics:

```text
SAV, CLK, FOL, SEA
```

## Education / study

Best mechanisms:

```text
checklists
memory frameworks
mistake correction
search-first tutorials
```

Primary metrics:

```text
SAV, SEA, FOL
```

## Fitness / health, non-medical

Best mechanisms:

```text
visible form correction
before/after movement
safety/trust guardrails
simple routine templates
```

Primary metrics:

```text
SAV, SND, FOL
```

## Food / recipe

Best mechanisms:

```text
result-first visual
process compression
ingredient checklist
sensory payoff
```

Primary metrics:

```text
CTV, CPL, SAV, SND
```

## Commentary / news

Best mechanisms:

```text
clear framing
proof/source first
contrarian but accurate hook
trust guardrails
```

Primary metrics:

```text
EHR, CMT, SND, TRU
```

## Creator education

Best mechanisms:

```text
teardowns
retention clinic
proof screenshots
caption/hook labs
series identity
```

Primary metrics:

```text
SAV, FOL, SEA, CTV
```
